reviews.comment:
La atención fue excelente y muy amable ! Los baños estaban muy limpios y desinfectados ! Tiene de todo para ser un lugar tan pequeño ! ^^

(Translated by Google)
The service was excellent and very friendly! The bathrooms were very clean and disinfected! It has everything you need for such a small place! ^^

reviews.comment:
Más o menos falta agua en los baños y cuando los querés usar te dicen no hay agua por más que cargues combustible

(Translated by Google)
There's more or less a lack of water in the bathrooms, and when you want to use them they tell you there's no water even if you fill up with fuel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPdTQtMlF3EAE

reviews.comment:
No me agradó. Fui a cargar combustible, acepto que por diferentes cuestiones no tengan combustible súper, pero no aceptan tarjeta Mastercard, y en ese momento era la única que tenía y tuve que pagar el combustible con efectivo para poder seguir mi camino. Les pregunté en dónde había para inflar ruedas, me señalaron la máquina pero ni si quiera funciona. Muy abandonado el lugar.

(Translated by Google)
I didn't like it. I went to get gas; I understand that for various reasons they don't have premium fuel, but they don't accept Mastercard, and at that moment it was the only card I had, so I had to pay for the gas in cash to be able to continue on my way. I asked them where I could inflate tires; they pointed to the machine, but it wasn't even working. The place was very run down.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPazVfM29nRRAB
